creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
% date ; uname -v
Tue 12 Jan 2021 04:30:03 GMT
FreeBSD 13.0-CURRENT #75 main-c572-g82397d791: Sun Jan  3 20:00:09 GMT 2021     root@mowa219-gjp4-8570p:/usr/obj/usr/src/amd64.amd64/sys/GENERIC-NODEBUG 
% pkg query '%o %v %R' gammy
accessibility/gammy 0.9.61 FreeBSD
% pkg info gammy | grep stalled
Installed on   : Tue Jan 12 03:17:15 2021 GMT
% 

When I run Gammy, there's no longer a GUI; and nothing in the system tray notification area.
